summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of BIBI Cars CRM dynamic auth configuration feature. All backend APIs (27/27 tests) and frontend UI flows passed successfully. Tested: public settings endpoint, admin auth settings CRUD, customer password reset flow (forgot/validate/reset), feature flags, password policy validation, cache invalidation, and all UI pages.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login (POST /api/auth/login) - 200 with access_token
Backend: Public settings (GET /api/settings/public) - safe subset, no secrets exposed
Backend: Admin get auth settings (GET /api/admin/settings/auth) - full doc with _resolved panel, jwt.secret masked
Backend: Admin patch auth settings (PATCH /api/admin/settings/auth) - deep merge, cache invalidation verified
Backend: Customer registration (POST /api/customer-auth/register) - 200 with sessionToken
Backend: Customer login valid (POST /api/customer-auth/login) - 200 with sessionToken
Backend: Customer login invalid (POST /api/customer-auth/login) - 401 for wrong password
Backend: Forgot password existing email (POST /api/customer-auth/forgot-password) - 200 with dry_run reset_link
Backend: Forgot password non-existing email (POST /api/customer-auth/forgot-password) - 200 without reset_link (no enumeration)
Backend: Validate reset token valid (GET /api/customer-auth/validate-reset-token) - 200 with valid=true, masked email
Backend: Validate reset token invalid (GET /api/customer-auth/validate-reset-token) - 400
Backend: Reset password valid token (POST /api/customer-auth/reset-password) - 200 with sessionToken
Backend: Reset password token already used (POST /api/customer-auth/reset-password) - 400
Backend: Old password invalid after reset - 401 for old password
Backend: New password works after reset - 200 with sessionToken
Backend: Password minLength=10 validation - 400 for 8-char password
Backend: Password minLength=10 validation - 200 for 10-char password
Backend: Feature flag resetPasswordEnabled=false - 403 for forgot-password
Backend: Feature flag resetPasswordEnabled=true - 200 for forgot-password
Frontend: Admin /admin/settings/auth page loads with all blocks (URLs, Google, Password, JWT, Email)
Frontend: Resolved panel displays effective values (baseUrl, frontendUrl, googleClientId)
Frontend: baseUrl edit and save works, persists after reload
Frontend: password.minLength and resetTokenTtl fields display correct values
Frontend: Public /cabinet/forgot-password page renders form
Frontend: Forgot password success shows dry-run box with clickable reset link
Frontend: Public /cabinet/reset-password with valid token shows form with masked email
Frontend: Reset password success redirects to /cabinet
Frontend: Public /cabinet/reset-password with invalid token shows error message and 'Request new' button
Frontend: Admin sidebar has 'Auth & URLs' link under Settings menu, navigates to /admin/settings/auth
